---
title: "The Rev. Thomas Keble jr."
---

## The Rev. Thomas Keble jr.

**Dates:** (1826-1903)

### Description

nephew of [[person:798]John Keble]

### Biography

He married, first (1851) Cornelia Sarah Cornish (1828-23 Dec 1858) and, secondly (1862) Mary Caroline Turner (b. 1831/2).  He succeeded his father and namesake as Vicar of Bisley.  He was heir and literary executor of his uncle John Keble.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 17 th 1894
- Letter from Decr 17th [1875][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from [1 October 1870]
- Letter from Aug 6th [1870?[[footnote:2]]]
- Letter from Aug 6th [1866?][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Aug. 26 [1865]
- Letter from February 16, 1859
- Letter from May 14, 1848
- Letter from [<i>c</i>. 21 October 1839]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
